'''tabawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymotype|nymotype]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymotype|nymotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tabawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tæbæwæth || tæbæwæj || tæbæwæsh || tæbæwæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tababawath || tababawaj || tababawash || tababawa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tabawath || tabawaj || tabawash || tabawa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tabafwafth || tabafwafj || tabafwafsh || tabafwaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tabawatha || tabawaja || tabawasha || tabawaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || tabawath || tabawaj || tabawash || tabawa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tabawathal || tabawajal || tabawashal || tabawakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tabawaathatha || tabawaajaja || tabawaashasha || tabawaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || tabawathan || tabawajan || tabawashan || tabawakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tabawathaoro || tabawajaoro || tabawashaoro || tabawakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
